zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Blount於1445年出生在英國史洛普爾金萊特時，他的父親Sir Humphrey Blount22歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Winnington18歲。他於大約1468年與Agnes Kinweston在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾伯頓 武朋 特倫特結婚。他於1480年被列為sheriff of shropshire。他去世於1524年6月4日在英國武斯特斯爾艾斯利享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾卡芙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Blount于1445年出生在英国史洛普爾金萊特时，他的父亲Sir Humphrey Blount22岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Winnington18岁。他于大约1468年与Agnes Kinweston在英国英格兰斯塔福爾伯頓 武朋 特倫特结婚。他于1480年被列为sheriff of shropshire。他去世于1524年6月4日在英国武斯特斯爾艾斯利享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾卡芙特。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Blount was born in 1445, in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, his father, Sir Humphrey Blount, was 22 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Winnington, was 18. He married Agnes Kinweston about 1468, in Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. In 1480, at the age of 35, his occupation is listed as sheriff of shropshire. He died on 4 June 1524, in Astley, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Croft, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Englan: Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Blount est né en 1445, à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Humphrey Blount, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Winnington, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Kinweston environ 1468, à Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. En 1480, à l’âge de 35 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of shropshire. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1524, à Astley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Croft, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Englan: Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Blount 1445 in Kinlet, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Humphrey Blount 22 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Winnington 18. Er hat um 1468 in Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Kinweston geheiratet. 1480, als er 35 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of shropshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. Juni 1524 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Astley, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Croft, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Englan: Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Blount è nato il nel 1445 nel Kinlet, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Humphrey Blount, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Winnington, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Kinweston circa 1468, nel Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Nel 1480, all'età di 35 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of shropshire. Morì il 4 giugno 1524, nel Astley, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Croft, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Blountが1445年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットで生まれた時，父Sir Humphrey Blountは22歳，母Lady Elizabeth Winningtonは18歳であった。約1468年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルトン ウプオン トレントでAgnes Kinwestonと結婚した。1480年，35歳の時，職業はsheriff of shropshireと記録されている。彼は1524年6月4日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアアストリーで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクロフトにて埋葬された。

ko.Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버턴 업 트렌트
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Blount(이)가 1445년 영국 슈럽실르 킨렛에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Humphrey Blount(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Winnington(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버턴 업 트렌트에서 Agnes Kinweston(와)과 결혼했다. 1480년, 35세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of shropshire이었다. 그는 1524년 6월 4일 영국 워스스터실르 애스틀리에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 크로프트에 묻혔다.

pt.Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Englan: Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Blount nasceu em 1445, em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Humphrey Blount, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Winnington, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Kinweston aproximadamente 1468, em Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Em 1480, com 35 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of shropshire. Ele faleceu em 4 de junho de 1524, em Astley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Englan: Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Englan: буртон упон трент, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Blount родился в 1445 г. в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Humphrey Blount было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Winnington, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Kinweston около 1468 г. в местности буртон упон трент, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. В 1480 году, в возрасте 35 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of shropshire. Он умер 4 июня 1524 г. в местности астли, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности крофт, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Blount nació en 1445, en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Humphrey Blount, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Winnington, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Agnes Kinweston aproximadamente 1468, en Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. En 1480, a la edad de 35 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of shropshire. Murió el 4 de junio de 1524, en Astley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Croft, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
